ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Oklahoma, Ottawa) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "toxpi_score" REAL /* ToxPi score for the region */,
  "hclust_group" INTEGER /* HClust group for the region */,
  "kmeans_group" INTEGER /* KMeans group for the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (population per square kilometer) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "infection_rates" (
  "infection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each infection rate record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "transmissible_cases" REAL /* Rate of transmissible cases */,
  "disease_spread" REAL /* Rate of disease spread */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the infection rate data */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of confirmed cases */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("infection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_infection_rates_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_concentration" (
  "pop_concentration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population concentration record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "pop_mobility" REAL /* Population mobility index */,
  "residential_density" REAL /* Residential density index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the population concentration data */,
  "average_household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "public_transport_usage" REAL /* Index of public transport usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pop_concentration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_concentration_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "social_distancing" REAL /* Social distancing effectiveness index */,
  "testing" REAL /* Testing effectiveness index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the intervention data */,
  "mask_wearing" REAL /* Index of mask-wearing compliance */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_environment" (
  "health_env_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health and environmental record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "pop_demographics" REAL /* Population demographics index */,
  "air_pollution" REAL /* Air pollution index */,
  "age_distribution" REAL /* Age distribution index */,
  "co_morbidities" REAL /* Co-morbidities index */,
  "health_disparities" REAL /* Health disparities index */,
  "hospital_beds" REAL /* Hospital beds availability index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the health and environmental data */,
  "smoking_prevalence" REAL /* Smoking prevalence */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate */,
  "water_quality" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_env_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_environment_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clustering" (
  "clustering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clustering record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "clustering_method" TEXT /* Clustering method used (e.g., HClust, KMeans) */,
  "cluster_group" INTEGER /* Cluster group assigned by the clustering method */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the clustering data */,
  "cluster_description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clustering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clustering_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the region data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the region data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update to the data source */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of updates to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_sources" (
  "region_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-source link */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "last_sync" TEXT /* Date of the last synchronization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_sources_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metrics_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, Markdown) */,
  "file_format_version" TEXT /* Version of the file format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
